description_long: This object is a stylized coconut palm tree with a tall, slender, cylindrical trunk that is light brown and vertically textured. The top of the trunk supports a dense cluster of large, elongated, and slightly curved leaves that radiate outward in all directions. The leaves are a pale green with subtle mottled patterns, giving them a natural, organic appearance. The foliage is arranged in layers, with some leaves overlapping and casting shadows on others, creating a sense of depth and volume. There are no visible coconuts or fruit clusters present among the leaves. The overall form is compact and idealized, resembling a decorative or simplified representation of a coconut palm commonly found in parks or urban landscapes.
description: A stylized coconut palm tree with a tall, textured trunk and a dense crown of large, pale green, mottled leaves radiating outward.
description_view_0: The palm tree is seen with its trunk centered and the leaves fanning out symmetrically, showing the layered arrangement of the foliage.
description_view_1: This view highlights the side profile of the trunk and the spread of the leaves, with some leaves appearing more prominent on the right.
description_view_2: A nearly frontal view with the trunk centered and the leaves forming a rounded, full canopy, emphasizing the tree's symmetry.
description_view_3: The palm is viewed from another side angle, with the leaves extending outward and some overlapping, creating a sense of depth.
attribute_husk_pattern: No visible coconut husk; the surface consists of a vertically textured trunk and smooth, mottled leaves with no discernible fiber pattern.
attribute_proximity_to_palm_trees: The object itself is a palm tree; no additional palm trees are visible nearby.
